ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "Possession / Handover"), OR( ISBLANK(Sale_Deed_Date__c), NOT(Signed_Sales_Deed_Uploaded__c), ISBLANK(Registration_Number__c), AND( ISPICKVAL(Funding_Type__c, "Loan"), NOT(DD_Uploaded__c) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill all the mandatory fields in Registration Section
